summary: Added the `diff` option to the GitHub Actions Ninja build matrix for GALE01, so CI would run the Ninja diff configuration in addition to the default and `all_source` configurations. The PR also updated GALE01 symbol metadata for several data and sdata2 entries, mostly correcting scope, size, and data-string/float annotations so the new diff build mode would have consistent symbol expectations.
what_changed: In `.github/workflows/build.yml`, expanded the GALE01 matrix options from `["", "all_source"]` to `["", "all_source", "diff"]`.

In `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`, adjusted several `.data` symbol declarations around addresses `0x803E86D0` through `0x803E98DC`, including changing some symbols from global to local scope, converting some named entries to local `@NNN` labels, marking several 0xB-sized entries as `data:string`, and reducing several trailing object sizes from larger aggregate-looking sizes such as `0x64`/`0x6C` to `0x34`.
Changed `grTCLink_803E86D0` from global to local scope and replaced `grTCl_803E8720` with local string label `@68` at size `0xB`.
Changed `grTPk_803E9270` to local `...data.0`, marked `grTPk_803E92C0` as a `0xB` global string, and adjusted `grTPk_803E92CC` size to `0x34`.
Changed `grTPr_803E9388` to local string label `@170` and adjusted `grTPr_803E9394` size to `0x34`.
Marked `grTGw_803E9748` and `grTGn_803E98D0` as `0xB` global strings and adjusted the following `grTGw_803E9754` and `grTGn_803E98DC` object sizes to `0x34`.
In `.sdata2`, changed three `ftSk_Init` float symbols at `0x804D9650`, `0x804D9654`, and `0x804D9658` from global names to local `@220`, `@233`, and `@467` float labels.
smart_moves: CI coverage was broadened by adding `diff` as a first-class Ninja matrix option rather than relying on developers to run that mode manually.
The symbol-file edits appear paired with the CI matrix change, suggesting the author validated and normalized symbol metadata needed for the stricter or newly exercised `diff` build path.

Several entries were split or reclassified as strings and smaller following objects, which is a useful pattern when symbol-map metadata had previously over-attributed adjacent string data to neighboring object symbols.
decomp_lessons: When adding a new build or diff mode to CI, check symbol metadata for assumptions that only show up under that mode; scope and data-kind annotations can affect generated outputs and comparisons.
Do not preserve global names for data symbols when evidence indicates they are local compiler-emitted constants; local `@NNN` labels may be more accurate and less misleading.
Adjacent string constants can cause incorrect object sizes in `symbols.txt`; reclassify the string entry and shrink the neighboring aggregate/object symbol when the layout supports it.
A CI matrix change may require small configuration cleanups outside the workflow file to make the newly enabled mode pass reproducibly.
naming_conventions: Local compiler-style constants in `symbols.txt` may be represented as `@NNN` labels, such as `@68`, `@170`, `@220`, `@233`, and `@467`.
Some anonymous local data can be represented with a generated name such as `...data.0` when no stable semantic name is available.
Symbol metadata lines include address, section, type, size, scope, and optional data kind annotations such as `data:string`, `data:float`, and `data:double`.
The PR did not include discussion explaining the naming choices; conventions are inferred from the changed `symbols.txt` entries.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use `data:string` annotations for string-sized data entries instead of folding them into neighboring object symbols.
Correct symbol `scope` from `global` to `local` when the symbol should not be externally exposed in the map.
Shrink object sizes after carving out adjacent strings or local constants, as shown by several changes from `0x64` or `0x6C` to `0x34`.
Use CI to run the Ninja `diff` configuration so symbol and matching regressions are detected automatically.
searchable_terms: Add diff to Ninja build matrix
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that changed the Ninja build matrix or removed/modified the `diff` option.
Search for symbol metadata fixes involving `data:string` and object size reductions in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`.
Check whether the `diff` Ninja option exposed additional symbol scope or size mismatches after PR 1316.
Review build workflow history around `.github/workflows/build.yml` matrix options `all_source` and `diff`.
